## Authors & Acknowledgements
This Paper has been developed by the following core team of authors in the Public Health Agency of Canada (PHAC):
James Ball, Director General, Strategic Initiatives and Innovations Directorate
Marie DesMeules, Director, Health Determinants and Global Initiatives Division, Strategic Initiatives and Innovations Directorate
Albert Kwan, Policy Analyst, Strategic Initiatives and Innovations Directorate (Principal Writer)
Linda Jacobsen, Senior Policy Analyst, Health Determinants and Global Initiatives Division, Strategic Initiatives and Innovations Directorate
Wei Luo, Senior Policy Analyst, Innovations and Trends Analysis Division, Strategic Initiatives and Innovations Directorate
Beth Jackson, Manager, Innovations and Trends Analysis Division, Strategic Initiatives and Innovations Directorate
Sincere thanks are extended to the Public Health Agency of Canada colleagues, in particular Sylvie Desjardins, Alan Diener, Nabanita Giri, Doug Hopkins, and Howard Morrison, for providing expert advice and feedback. We would also like to thanks Trevor Hancock (BC Ministry of Healthy Living and Sport) and Alan Shiell (University of Calgary) for their insightful and constructive comments as external reviewers.
